'''Vul Tazaene''' was a [[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]] [[Security officer/Legends|security officer]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]]. By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], he was looking for a pair of [[Twin/Legends|identical twin]] [[Con artist/Legends|con artists]] called the [[Tonnika sisters/Legends|Tonnika sisters]]. He had also fallen in love with one of them, though he was not sure if it was [[Brea Tonnika/Legends|Brea]] or [[Senni Tonnika/Legends|Senni Tonnika]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Tazaene was present in the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] when the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]] performed a song and witnessed the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] drop the [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] dancer [[Oola/Legends|Oola]] into the pit of his [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|pet rancor]].

He remained present the next morning when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] [[Siege of Jabba's Palace|arrived]] in an attempt to [[Rescue of Han Solo/Legends|rescue]] his friend [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Tazaene also accompanied the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] to his [[Luxury-class sail barge|luxury sail barge]], the [[Khetanna/Legends|''Khetanna'']], when Skywalker and Solo were taken to be [[Death/Legends|executed]] at the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]]. The captives [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon|fought back]], however, and the [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barge]] was ultimately destroyed.

==Biography==
===Tonnika sisters and Jabba's Palace===
[[File:LojeNella-MaxReboBand-ROTJ.png|thumb|left|300px|Tazaene witnessing the Max Rebo Band's performance]]
A [[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]], Vul Tazaene hailed from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CCG" /> By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> he worked as a [[Security officer/Legends|security officer]], and was searching for the [[Tonnika sisters/Legends|Tonnika sisters]],<ref name="CCG" /> a pair of [[Twin/Legends|identical twin]] [[Con artist/Legends|con artists]].<ref name="Tonnikas' DB">{{DB|character|tonnikasisters|Tonnika, Brea & Senni}}</ref> Tazaene also fell in love with one of them, although he was not sure whether it was [[Brea Tonnika/Legends|Brea]] or [[Senni Tonnika/Legends|Senni Tonnika]].<ref name="CCG" />

In 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="NEC" /> Tazaene was present in the [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] of [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], standing near the stage and talking to courtier [[Taym Dren-garen/Legends|Taym Dren-garen]] when the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]] performed a song. Shortly thereafter, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] dropped the [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] dancer [[Oola/Legends|Oola]] into the pit of his [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|pet rancor]], and Tazaene was among those who rushed forward to witness her [[Death/Legends|demise]].<ref name="ROTJ" />

===Luke Skywalker's arrival and battle over Carkoon===
The next morning,<ref name="ROTJ junior novel">[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi (junior novelization)|''Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi'' junior novelization]]</ref> Tazaene remained present, talking to another courtier while many of the others slept, when [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] [[Siege of Jabba's Palace|arrived]] with the intent of [[Rescue of Han Solo/Legends|rescuing]] his friend, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who was held [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] in the palace's [[Prison/Legends|dungeons]]. Tazaene was among the individuals present in the palace's courtroom when Skywalker attempted to negotiate Solo's freedom with the Hutt, during which Jabba dropped the Jedi into the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] pit.<ref name="ROTJ" />

[[File:Tazaene.png|thumb|right|300px|Tazaene on the ''Khetanna'']]
Tazaene and the others in the courtroom watched as Skywalker battled the rancor, during which the Jedi unexpectedly killed the creature. Following Skywalker's victory, Jabba sentenced him, Solo, and their companion [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to be executed at the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]]. Tazaene and other court members accompanied the Hutt on his [[Luxury-class sail barge|luxury sail barge]], the [[Khetanna/Legends|''Khetanna'']], in order to witness the execution of Skywalker and his friends. While on the journey, Tazaene was one of the passengers who were served drinks by [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. Tazaene was standing on the dais behind Jabba to witness the executions, although the captives [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon|fought back]] against the Hutt's gang members, leading to the destruction of the [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barge]].<ref name="ROTJ" />

==Personality and traits==
Although he fell in love with one of the Tonnika sisters, Vul Tazaene was not sure which one.<ref name="CCG" /> He was fair-skinned with no [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and had facial [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]]. He laughed in delight when Oola and Luke Skywalker were dropped in the rancor pit.<ref name="ROTJ" />

==Equipment==
During his [[Time/Legends|time]] at Jabba's Palace<ref name="ROTJ" /> in 4 ABY,<ref name="NEC" /> Tazaene wore a [[Color/Legends|black]] outfit with [[Armor/Legends|armor]] covering his [[Limb/Legends|shoulder]].<ref name="ROTJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vul Tazaene first appeared in [[1983]]'s [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], in which he was portrayed by an uncredited extra.<ref name="ROTJ" /> He was later given a name and brief backstory on a card in [[April]] [[1998]]'s ''[[Jabba's Palace Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
